_comment: Example world descriptor (rpg-da8c / rpg-yrnu). A world is a set of ZONES -- irregular, variable-size world boxes (NOT a regular grid); a zone may span several light-data chunks. Each zone names its own scene descriptor and, optionally, its own render config, so the config + scene subsystems load PER ZONE: world_desc_zone_at(player) picks the active zone, world_desc_zone_config(i) resolves its render config (own -> world default -> engine default). Paths are relative to the world file's directory. Parsed by world_desc_load.
name: example_world
